title: Buttery British Oat Crumble
description: A classic British dessert featuring a buttery, chewy oat topping and a creamy single cream filling, perfect for a quick-fix dessert. This nut-free-friendly dish is slow-cooked to perfection.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the rolled oats, brown sugar, granulated sugar, and salt.
Add the melted butter to the oat mixture and stir until well combined.
In a separate bowl, mix together the single cream, mixed berries, and vanilla extract.
Transfer the cream mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
Top the cream mixture with the oat mixture, spreading it evenly.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the filling is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve warm, topped with additional mixed berries if desired.
